title: Unique Items
description: Specified items that can only be created a certain amount of times whether from crafts or loot tables.
body: # Unique Items **....is a Minecraft server utility mod that allows you to make any item you want only pop up a select amount of times in your world** ***This mod may be used in any modpack.*** ## ➕ Features - The configuration file lets you edit what items should be unique, whether the list of items is inverted, how many times an item can show up, etc. - When the item is crafted, or spawned by loot tables (entities, chests, block drops, etc), then the "uniqueness" of the item goes down. When the uniqueness value reaches 0, the item will no longer be craftable or spawn. ## ❓ FAQ - Does crafting an item from custom crafting benches from other mods count? - At the moment, unfortunately not. This may change in the future if I am able to find a way to make this mod compatible with custom benches. ## 👏 Credits - Thanks to Jeryn99 for code used. - Thanks to Wicked for the idea and textures.
